text:
There once lived in a quiet forest a squirrel named Squeaker. Squeaker loved to play with acorns all day.

One afternoon, while chasing after a particularly juicy Acorn Royale, Squeaker stumbled across a broken-down canoe. Being the adventurous little squirrel that he was, he looked around to make sure nothing dangerous lurked nearby.

With a paw hoofed and acorn cradled beneath his chest feathers, Squeaker rowed skillfully across the little lake that rested next to the forest. He paddled gently around his favorite rock outcropping just waiting for an opportunity to explore.

As twilight drew near, a variety of creatures gathered around the lake. Frogs sang evening songs, birds tweeted their delight, and insects buzzed their evening hums. Little did Squeaker know, there was a wise old owl perched atop a willow branch just waiting to catch the last rays of the setting sun.
